Starlight Flowers

Fresh, local bouquets grown and arranged with care in Sebastopol.

sign up for flowers view bouquet packages

dear readers

Last summer I began Starlight Flowers as a way to share the abundance of beautiful blooms, spend time creating bouquets, and fund my travels. It brought me so much joy and was the highlight of my summer. Thank you to all who supported me!

Currently, I am completing my second year at Cal Poly, SLO and getting ready to study abroad in Florence, Italy next fall. I am so excited to get back to the garden and continue to build and grow Starlight Flowers.

Below is a description of how the 8 week flower subscription works, plus a simple form to share your interest. It would be a pleasure to fill your summer with fresh, local flowers, grown and arranged with care.

With Love, adalie feyh
the details

Bouquet Options

You will get to choose from a mason jar bouquet or a wrapped bouquet to receive weekly. If you would like, there is the option to add a weekly bud vase. Compote arrangements are available anytime with one week's notice.

Receiving Your Flowers

Flowers can be delivered within Sebastopol for an additional $5.00 per week. You can also choose pickup in Sebastopol. Your flowers will be ready at roughly the same time each week, within one or two days.

Vase Swap

Each bouquet will be received in a vase. If the flowers are still doing well by the next week, you can transfer them to one of your own jars so the vase can be returned and the rotation can continue.

Dates

The flower season begins the week of June 22nd and ends the week of August 10th, giving you 8 full weeks of color and joy.

Delivery within Sebastopol is available for an additional $5.00 per week. Pickup is also available in Sebastopol. Compote arrangements are available with one week's notice.
